title: Sony Group tech can identify original music in AI-generated songs - Nikkei Asia
text:
Artificial intelligence
Sony Group tech can identify original music in AI-generated songs
Japanese company seeks to help copyright holders receive share of revenue
Sony Group operates major music labels under its umbrella. (Photo by Mizuho Miyazaki)
REI NAKAFUJI
February 16, 2026 03:07 JST
PALO ALTO, California -- Sony Group has developed a technology that can identify the underlying music used in tunes generated by artificial intelligence, making it possible for songwriters to seek compensation from AI developers if their music was used.
